infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: H2oDigiGraph needs camera access to photograph stream gage charts in the field.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: H2oDigiGraph uses your location to tag field-captured gage chart photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: H2oDigiGraph needs photo library access to select existing gage chart images.
